# Sidebar

## Native basis

`<aside>` + `<nav>` for application sidebar navigation.

## Native Web APIs

- [`<aside>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/aside) — complementary content
- [`<nav>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/nav) — navigation landmark

## Structure

```html
<aside class="app-sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-header"><span class="sidebar-logo">App</span></div>
  <nav class="sidebar-nav">
    <a class="sidebar-link" data-active="true" href="#">Dashboard</a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" href="#">Settings</a>
  </nav>
</aside>
```
